title: Front Yard Build
description:
Fresh front yard transformation completed with TifTuf hybrid Bermuda turf and a fully installed irrigation system for long-term lawn health and easy maintenance.

This modern suburban home now features a lush, drought-tolerant TifTuf lawn, professionally levelled and neatly edged to complement the clean lines of the driveway and pathways. A new irrigation setup ensures the turf receives consistent watering, helping it stay green and resilient through South Australia’s hot summers.

The result is a low-maintenance, water-efficient landscape that enhances the street appeal of the property while providing a durable lawn built to thrive in local conditions.

title: Moprhett Vale Garden Wall
description:
Front yard upgrade featuring new garden walls, irrigation installation, Kikuyu turf, and decorative Yankstone for a clean and practical landscape.

We constructed the retaining garden walls to shape the space and create defined planting areas, helping manage the slope while giving the property a more structured look. A new irrigation system was installed to ensure reliable watering across the garden and lawn.

The base of the area was finished with fresh Kikuyu turf, providing a hardy, fast-growing lawn suited to South Australian conditions. The surrounding beds were completed with Yankstone, offering a neat, low-maintenance finish that complements the natural surroundings.

The result is a tidy, durable front landscape that improves both functionality and street appeal.

title: Onkaparinga Hills Front Lawn
description:
Front yard renovation completed with new TifTuf hybrid Bermuda turf and a Hunter MP Rotator irrigation system.

The existing area was excavated and prepared to create a level base for the new lawn installation. Fresh TifTuf turf was then laid, providing a drought-tolerant, hard-wearing lawn well suited to South Australian conditions.

To ensure consistent watering, we installed Hunter MP Rotator sprinklers, delivering even water coverage across the entire lawn area. This system helps maximise water efficiency while promoting strong, healthy turf growth.

The finished result is a clean, durable lawn with reliable irrigation, improving both the appearance and functionality of the front yard.
